title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 478.700 - Circuit No. 25, number of judges, divisions — when judges elected
text:
478.700.  Circuit No. 25, number of judges, divisions — when judges elected. — 1.  There shall be two circuit judges in the twenty-fifth judicial circuit consisting of the counties of Maries, Phelps, Pulaski and Texas.  These judges shall sit in divisions numbered one and two.
  2.  The circuit judge in division two shall be elected in 1980.  The circuit judge in division one shall be elected in 1982.
(L. 1973 H.B. 69, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Effective 1-02-79
